entry.title: Permeability of coffee packed beds via lattice Boltzmann simulation
entry.summary: We compute the permeability of a coffee packed bed using pore scale lattice Boltzmann simulation and compare against measured porosity.

entry.title: Poroelastic consolidation of deformable porous media under flow
entry.summary: A poroelastic consolidation model for deformable porous media subject to pressure-driven flow, with a compaction closure.

entry.title: A barista training guide to espresso extraction
entry.summary: A marketing overview of espresso extraction for barista training courses.
